calls.notes: WHERE Name = request.Name — case-sensitive exact match.
If count > 0, throws DuplicateException — caught by ExceptionMiddleware → HTTP 409 Conflict. No insert occurs.

calls.method: new CatalogItem(request.CatalogTypeId, request.CatalogBrandId, request.Description, request.Name, request.Price, request.PictureUri)
calls.notes: Entity constructor — sets all fields. PictureUri from the request is stored initially but immediately overwritten after insert.
Inserts the new row; returned newItem has Id populated by EF Core.
Only called when newItem.Id != 0 (i.e., always after a successful insert). Sets PictureUri to 'images\\products\\eCatalog-item-default.png?{ticks}'. Image upload is disabled per security advisory.
Persists the overwritten PictureUri. Only called when newItem.Id != 0.
Leaf — rewrites the stored PictureUri to an absolute URL for the response DTO.
